signals.content_en: The U.S. Trade Representative has initiated a forced labor Section 301 investigation and proposed additional tariffs. This may affect China-origin goods exported globally, especially those with U.S. supply chain links. General high-tech trade baseline applies.
signals.content_zh: 美国贸易代表办公室发起强迫劳动301调查并拟加征关税，可能影响中国出口至全球的货物，特别是涉及美国供应链的产品。适用一般高科技贸易基线。

checklist.desc: Prepare commercial invoice, packing list, contract, and export license slots for general electronics.
Run China export control and cryptography reviews for wireless/secure computing features.
Review supply chain for any forced labor allegations; prepare documentation to demonstrate compliance.
Ensure proper 'Made in China' marking on products and packaging.
Evaluate potential tariff increases under Section 301 and adjust pricing or sourcing accordingly.

signals.content_en: The Department of Commerce has eased export controls for the UAE, reducing licensing requirements for certain items. This change may affect US export controls and entity list screening procedures.
signals.content_zh: 美国商务部放宽了对阿联酋的出口管制，减少了某些物项的许可要求。这一变化可能影响美国出口管制和实体清单筛查程序。

checklist.desc: Confirm intentional radiators, modular approvals, and supplier FCC IDs for wireless electronics before US entry.
Map the 10-digit HTS line against Section 301 lists and additional duties; document country of origin and value build-up.
Run restricted party and export control screening; retain end-user and end-use statements for controlled semiconductors.

signals.content_en: Applied Materials agreed to pay $252 million penalty for illegally exporting semiconductor manufacturing equipment to China, violating BIS export controls and Entity List restrictions.
signals.content_zh: 应用材料公司因非法向中国出口半导体制造设备，违反BIS出口管制和实体清单规定，同意支付2.52亿美元罚款。

checklist.desc: 确认设备ECCN编码，评估是否受EAR管制，特别是针对中国实体清单的最终用户和最终用途限制。
对交易方（买方、收货人、最终用户）进行实体清单、SDN清单等受限方筛查，并保留筛查记录。

checklist.task: 最终用户和最终用途声明
checklist.desc: 获取并审核最终用户和最终用途声明，确保不涉及军事最终用途或实体清单实体。
确认设备HTS编码是否在301关税清单内，计算附加关税并准备相关申报文件。
如设备含无线功能，确认FCC Part 15/18认证，保留FCC ID和合规声明。

signals.content_en: The US Department of Commerce revised license review policy for semiconductors exported to China, tightening controls on advanced chips and related equipment. Exporters must align with BIS Entity List screening and Section 301 tariff exposure.
signals.content_zh: 美国商务部修订了对华半导体出口的许可证审查政策，加强了对先进芯片及相关设备的管控。出口商必须符合BIS实体清单筛查和301条款关税风险。

checklist.desc: Screen all parties against BIS Entity List and Denied Persons List; obtain end-user and end-use statements for controlled semiconductors.
Map the 10-digit HTS line against Section 301 lists and additional duties; document country of origin and value build-up.
Confirm intentional radiators, modular approvals, and supplier FCC IDs for wireless electronics before US entry.
Determine ECCN and verify if license exception applies; document classification rationale.
Prepare BIS license application with detailed technical specifications and end-use justification.

signals.content_en: The Department of Commerce rescinded a Biden-era firearms rule, restoring common sense to export controls on civilian firearms. This change may affect licensing requirements for certain firearms exports.
signals.content_zh: 美国商务部撤销了拜登时期的枪支规则，恢复了对民用枪支出口管制的常识性做法。这一变化可能影响某些枪支的出口许可要求。

checklist.desc: 确认产品ECCN编码，评估是否受EAR管辖及许可例外适用性。
对最终用户和最终用途进行实体清单及被拒绝人员筛查。
确认HTS编码是否涉及301关税清单，计算附加关税。
准备原产地证书及价值构成文件，确保符合美国海关要求。

signals.content_en: The Department of Commerce expanded the Entity List to cover affiliates of listed entities, increasing the risk of export restrictions for semiconductor and electronics shipments to the US. Companies must verify that all parties in the transaction, including affiliates, are not on the Entity List or subject to BIS export controls.
signals.content_zh: 美国商务部将实体清单扩展至涵盖被列实体的关联公司，增加了向美国出口半导体和电子产品的限制风险。企业必须核实交易中的所有相关方（包括关联公司）是否不在实体清单上或受BIS出口管制。

checklist.desc: Confirm intentional radiators, modular approvals, and supplier FCC IDs for wireless electronics before US entry.
Map the 10-digit HTS line against Section 301 lists and additional duties; document country of origin and value build-up.
Run restricted party and export control screening; retain end-user and end-use statements for controlled semiconductors.
Check all affiliates of the end customer against the Entity List and BIS regulations to ensure no indirect export restrictions apply.
Obtain signed end-use and end-user statements from US consignees, especially for items with dual-use potential.

signals.content_en: The Department of Commerce has closed a loophole that allowed foreign-owned semiconductor fabs in China to bypass export controls. This action tightens restrictions on the export of advanced semiconductor manufacturing equipment and technology to China, particularly targeting foreign-owned facilities that previously could receive controlled items without a license. Exporters must now ensure compliance with expanded BIS regulations, including Entity List screening and end-use checks.
signals.content_zh: 美国商务部堵住了外国在华半导体工厂规避出口管制的漏洞。此举加强了对中国先进半导体制造设备和技术的出口限制，特别针对此前可无许可证接收受控物品的外资工厂。出口商现在必须确保遵守扩大的BIS法规，包括实体清单筛查和最终用途检查。

checklist.desc: 确认产品是否属于新增受控物项（如先进半导体设备、技术），并评估是否需要出口许可证。
对最终用户和最终用途进行实体清单筛查，确保不涉及被制裁实体。
获取并保留最终用户和最终用途声明，证明产品不会用于军事或敏感用途。
根据HTS编码评估是否适用Section 301附加关税，并准备原产地证明。
如产品含无线功能，确认FCC Part 15/18认证，并保留供应商FCC ID。
